pr.title: Record: L-BFGS Causal SLOT — val_bpb 1.0046 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: L-BFGS causal SLOT logit optimization with focal loss/warm-start keeps predictions causal, paired with AdamW pre-quant TTT and coprime-shard loader tweaks.
techniques: L-BFGS logit-space SLOT optimizing only already-scored context positions
AdamW pre-quant TTT on EMA weights before GPTQ
Coprime-stride weighted shard loader plus QK_GAIN/WARMDOWN/GPTQ damp tweaks
